target.query:
from(bucket: "market_features")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pattern_events")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.symbol == "${symbol}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "price")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: float(v: r._value)}))

targets.query:
from(bucket: "market_features")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "market_microstructure")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.symbol == "${symbol}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "mid" or r._field == "vwap" or r._field == "bid_wall_price" or r._field == "ask_wall_price")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "market_features")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "market_microstructure")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.symbol == "${symbol}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "obi" or r._field == "cvd_norm" or r._field == "vwap_deviation_pct")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "market_features")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "market_microstructure")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.symbol == "${symbol}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "volatility_pct" or r._field == "atr_pct" or r._field == "regime_vol_ema")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "market_features")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "market_microstructure")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.symbol == "${symbol}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "bid_wall_dist_pct" or r._field == "ask_wall_dist_pct")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "market_features")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "market_microstructure")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.symbol == "${symbol}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "trade_intensity" or r._field == "liquidation_score" or r._field == "order_flow_speed")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "market_features")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "market_microstructure")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.symbol == "${symbol}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "trend_15m_pct" or r._field == "trend_1h_pct" or r._field == "funding_rate")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "market_features")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "market_microstructure")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.symbol == "${symbol}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "spread_bps")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: All Microstructure (overlay, z-score)
panels.description: OBI, CVD, VWAP dev, vol, ATR — z-score normalized for pattern comparison

targets.query:
fields = ["obi", "cvd_norm", "vwap_deviation_pct", "volatility_pct", "atr_pct", "liquidation_score"]
from(bucket: "market_features")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "market_microstructure")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.symbol == "${symbol}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r._field, set: fields))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: (r._value - mean(column: "_value")) / (stddev(column: "_value") + 0.0000001) }))

from(bucket: "market_features")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pattern_events")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.symbol == "${symbol}")
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time", "event_type"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 100)

query.query:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(
  bucket: "market_features",
  tag: "symbol",
  predicate: (r) => r._measurement == "market_microstructure" or r._measurement == "orderbook_summary",
  start: -7d
)
